app.name: Live SLIDE CENTER
app.tagline: Centralized presentation management for live events

auth.goToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.errorGeneric: The operation could not be completed. Please try again.
auth.errorSessionRefresh: Could not refresh your session after sign-up. Please try again in a moment or sign in with the same email.
auth.errorTenantProvisioning: Your tenant workspace is not yet present on the access token. Wait a few seconds and try again, or sign in with the same email.
auth.signupCheckEmailBody: We sent a confirmation link to the address you provided. After you confirm your email, sign in to finish tenant activation and refresh your access token.
auth.errorLoginRefresh: Could not confirm your access profile after sign-in. Please try again.
auth.errorTenantMissingLogin: Your access profile does not include the organization (tenant) required for Slide Center. Contact your administrator or use a different account.

event.title: Event
event.name: Event name
event.listIntro: Events for your organization (RLS-isolated). Create an event to start the workflow.
event.emptyList: No events yet. Use the form above to create one.
event.dateOrderError: End date must be on or after the start date.
event.notFound: Event not found or not accessible for your account.

errors.missingTenant: No tenant on this session. Sign out and sign in again, or contact support.
errors.invalidRoute: Invalid event id in the URL.

tenantQuota.sectionAria: Subscription usage and plan limits for your organization
tenantQuota.storageMeterAria: Storage used as a percentage of the plan limit
tenantQuota.eventsMonthHint: Events are counted by start date in the current calendar month ({{month}}), in your browser's local timezone.
tenantQuota.eventDetailIntro: Organization storage and the room limit for this event (per your subscription).
tenantQuota.eventsAtCap: You have reached the monthly event limit for your plan. Upgrade the plan or wait until next month.
tenantQuota.roomsAtCap: You have reached the maximum number of rooms for this event under your plan.
tenantQuota.loadErrorNoRow: Organization limits are unavailable. Try again or contact support.

errors.eventsPerMonthExceeded: Cannot create the event: the monthly event limit for your plan has been reached.
errors.roomsPerEventExceeded: Cannot add another room: the per-event room limit for your plan has been reached.

room.title: Room
room.name: Room name
room.eventDetailIntro: Rooms linked to this event (create, inline edit of name/type, delete). Data is tenant-isolated (RLS).
room.emptyEventList: No rooms yet — add one using the form above.
room.deleteCascadeHint: Deleting this room also removes linked sessions and speakers (PostgreSQL ON DELETE CASCADE).

errors.missingContext: Incomplete context for this room. Reload the page.
errors.nameRequired: The room name cannot be empty.

session.title: Session
session.roomUnknown: Room not found in the current list
session.eventDetailIntro: Sessions per room: create, inline edit (title, room, type, schedule), drag-and-drop reorder (persisted display_order), optional By room read-only schedule view, and two-step delete.
session.emptyEventList: No sessions yet — add one using the form above.
session.needRoomFirst: Create at least one room in the section above before adding sessions.
session.deleteCascadeHint: Deleting this session also removes linked speakers (PostgreSQL ON DELETE CASCADE).
session.byRoomIntro: Sessions grouped by room and sorted by start time (read-only — edit from the list view).
session.dragListHint: Drag the ⋮⋮ handle next to a session and drop it on another row to update the list order (saved to the database).
session.reorderFailed: Could not save the new session order

errors.scheduleOrder: The scheduled end must be on or after the scheduled start.
errors.missingContext: Incomplete session context. Reload the page.
errors.titleRequired: The session title cannot be empty.

speaker.title: Speaker
speaker.eventDetailIntro: Speakers per session: create, inline edit (session, name, email), plus portal link and QR (90-day validity) for new records. Resumable uploads (TUS) are planned for Phase 3.
speaker.emptyEventList: No speakers yet — add one using the form above.
speaker.needSessionFirst: Create at least one session in the section above before adding speakers.
speaker.sessionUnknown: Session not found in the current list
speaker.copyUploadLinkFailed: Could not copy to the clipboard. Select the link manually.
speaker.uploadQrAria: QR code for the upload link for {{name}}
speaker.uploadLinkMissing: This speaker has no portal link yet (legacy record). Generate a link or delete and recreate the speaker.

csvImport.title: CSV import
csvImport.hint: UTF-8 file with a header row: session_title, full_name, email (optional). The session title must match exactly one session in this event (case-insensitive, trimmed). Maximum 200 data rows per import.
csvImport.fileAriaLabel: Select a CSV file to import speakers
csvImport.partialFailure: Import stopped after {{imported}} of {{total}} speaker(s). Reason: {{reason}}

errors.emptyFile: The file is empty or contains no data rows.
errors.tooManyRows: This import exceeds the limit of {{max}} data rows.
errors.ambiguousSession: Line {{line}}: multiple sessions share the title "{{title}}" — rename a session to make titles unique.

errors.nameRequired: The speaker name cannot be empty.

uploadPortal.intro: This public URL is reserved for presenter file uploads. Resumable uploads (TUS), virus scanning, and quota checks are not enabled yet — the Slide Center team dashboard remains the primary workflow until Phase 3 ships.

admin.dashboardIntro: Cross-tenant metadata view (no presentation file content). Detailed sections (/admin/tenants, quotas, audit) ship in Phase 7.
admin.tenantsIntro: Tenant metadata: plan, slug, storage usage. No presentation files (GDPR).

config.supabaseMissingSubtitle: To use sign-in and live data in development, set your project URL and the anonymous public API key.
config.supabaseMissingStep1: At the monorepo root, copy `.env.example` to `.env` (never commit `.env`).
config.supabaseMissingStep2: In Supabase: Settings → API. Paste Project URL into `VITE_SUPABASE_URL` and the anon public key into `VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY`.
config.supabaseMissingStep3: Save `.env` and restart the dev server (`pnpm run dev`).
config.supabaseMissingNote: Without these variables the browser client cannot reach the backend — this is expected, not a UI defect.
